name: accounting firms managing 10–20 SaaS subscriptions/month tool
description: For accounting firms managing 10–20 SaaS subscriptions/month, budget overruns cause cash flow gaps. We provide automated tracking instead of manual tracking via spreadsheets.
problem_solved: Difficulty in tracking and managing SaaS subscription costs effectively.
